setwd("C:/Users/myPC/OneDrive/Desktop/Quantium_Task2")

getwd()
list.files()

#######  Libraries Load\

install.packages("data.table")
install.packages("ggplot2")
install.packages("tidyr")

library(data.table)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)

data <- fread("QVI_data.csv")
head(data)


library(lubridate)
data[, YEARMONTH := year(DATE) * 100 + month(DATE)]

install.packages("lubridate")
library(lubridate)

head(data)


library(data.table)
class(data)

library(lubridate)
data[, YEARMONTH := year(DATE) * 100 + month(DATE)]

head(data)

##Monthly Metrics (measureOverTime)
measureOverTime <- data[, .(
  totSales = sum(TOT_SALES),
  nCustomers = uniqueN(LYLTY_CARD_NBR),
  nTxnPerCust = uniqueN(TXN_ID) / uniqueN(LYLTY_CARD_NBR),
  nChipsPerTxn = sum(PROD_QTY) / uniqueN(TXN_ID),
  avgPricePerUnit = sum(TOT_SALES) / sum(PROD_QTY)
), by = .(STORE_NBR, YEARMONTH)][order(STORE_NBR, YEARMONTH)]

head(measureOverTime)


#Pre-Trial Data Filter
storesWithFullObs <- unique(
  measureOverTime[, .N, STORE_NBR][N == 12, STORE_NBR]
)

preTrialMeasures <- measureOverTime[
  YEARMONTH < 201902 &
  STORE_NBR %in% storesWithFullObs
]
head(preTrialMeasures)
length(storesWithFullObs)


##calculateCorrelation() Function
calculateCorrelation <- function(inputTable, metricCol, storeComparison) {

  calcCorrTable <- data.table(
    Store1 = numeric(),
    Store2 = numeric(),
    corr_measure = numeric()
  )

  storeNumbers <- unique(inputTable$STORE_NBR)

  for(i in storeNumbers){

    if(i != storeComparison){

      corrValue <- cor(
        inputTable[STORE_NBR == storeComparison, eval(metricCol)],
        inputTable[STORE_NBR == i, eval(metricCol)]
      )

      calcCorrTable <- rbind(
        calcCorrTable,
        data.table(
          Store1 = storeComparison,
          Store2 = i,
          corr_measure = corrValue
        )
      )

    }

  }

  return(calcCorrTable)
}


trial_store <- 77

corr_nSales <- calculateCorrelation(
  preTrialMeasures,
  quote(totSales),
  trial_store
)

head(corr_nSales)

#######     calculateMagnitudeDistance () Function

calculateMagnitudeDistance <- function(inputTable, metricCol, storeComparison){

  calcDistTable <- data.table(
    Store1 = numeric(),
    Store2 = numeric(),
    YEARMONTH = numeric(),
    measure = numeric()
  )

  storeNumbers <- unique(inputTable$STORE_NBR)

  for(i in storeNumbers){

    if(i != storeComparison){

      calculatedMeasure <- data.table(
        Store1 = storeComparison,
        Store2 = i,
        YEARMONTH = inputTable[STORE_NBR == storeComparison, YEARMONTH],
        measure = abs(
          inputTable[STORE_NBR == storeComparison, eval(metricCol)] -
          inputTable[STORE_NBR == i, eval(metricCol)]
        )
      )

      calcDistTable <- rbind(calcDistTable, calculatedMeasure)

    }

  }

  minMaxDist <- calcDistTable[, .(
    minDist = min(measure),
    maxDist = max(measure)
  ), by = .(Store1, YEARMONTH)]

  distTable <- merge(
    calcDistTable,
    minMaxDist,
    by = c("Store1","YEARMONTH")
  )

  distTable[, magnitudeMeasure :=
              1 - (measure - minDist)/(maxDist - minDist)]

  finalDistTable <- distTable[, .(
    mag_measure = mean(magnitudeMeasure)
  ), by = .(Store1, Store2)]

  return(finalDistTable)

}

magnitude_nSales <- calculateMagnitudeDistance(
  preTrialMeasures,
  quote(totSales),
  trial_store
)

head(magnitude_nSales)




corr_nCustomers <- calculateCorrelation(
  preTrialMeasures,
  quote(nCustomers),
  trial_store
)

head(corr_nCustomers)

magnitude_nCustomers <- calculateMagnitudeDistance(
  preTrialMeasures,
  quote(nCustomers),
  trial_store
)

head(magnitude_nCustomers)

corr_nCustomers <- calculateCorrelation(
  preTrialMeasures,
  quote(nCustomers),
  trial_store
)


corr_weight <- 0.5

score_nSales <- merge(
  corr_nSales,
  magnitude_nSales,
  by = c("Store1","Store2")
)

score_nSales[, scoreNSales :=
               corr_weight * corr_measure +
               (1 - corr_weight) * mag_measure]

head(score_nSales)


score_nCustomers <- merge(
  corr_nCustomers,
  magnitude_nCustomers,
  by = c("Store1","Store2")
)

score_nCustomers[, scoreNCust :=
                   corr_weight * corr_measure +
                   (1 - corr_weight) * mag_measure]

head(score_nCustomers)

score_Control <- merge(
  score_nSales[, .(Store1, Store2, scoreNSales)],
  score_nCustomers[, .(Store1, Store2, scoreNCust)],
  by = c("Store1","Store2")
)


score_Control[, finalControlScore :=
                0.5 * scoreNSales +
                0.5 * scoreNCust]
                
                score_Control[order(-finalControlScore)][1:10]
                
                control_store <- score_Control[order(-finalControlScore)][1, Store2]

control_store

##Step 15: Sales Trend Graph
library(ggplot2)
install.packages("ggplot2")
library(ggplot2)
search()

ggplot()
ggplot(pastSales,
       aes(x = TransactionMonth,
           y = totSales,
           colour = Store_type)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1)


ggplot(pastSales,
       aes(TransactionMonth,
           totSales,
           colour = Store_type)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  labs(
    title = "Total Sales by Month",
    x = "Month",
    y = "Total Sales"
  )



########customer count graph

pastSales <- copy(measureOverTime)

pastSales[, Store_type := ifelse(
  STORE_NBR == trial_store,
  "Trial",
  ifelse(STORE_NBR == control_store,
         "Control",
         "Other Stores")
)]

pastSales <- pastSales[
  , .(totSales = mean(totSales)),
  by = .(YEARMONTH, Store_type)
]

pastSales[, TransactionMonth := as.Date(
  paste0(YEARMONTH %/% 100, "-", YEARMONTH %% 100, "-01")
)]

pastSales <- pastSales[YEARMONTH < 201903]

ggplot(pastSales,
       aes(TransactionMonth, totSales, colour = Store_type)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  labs(title = "Total Sales by Month")
  
  
  
  ###trialPeriod
  
  trialPeriod <- measureOverTime[
  YEARMONTH >= 201902 &
  (STORE_NBR == trial_store | STORE_NBR == control_store)
]

trialPeriod


library(ggplot2)

trialPeriod[, Store_type := ifelse(STORE_NBR == trial_store,
                                   "Trial",
                                   "Control")]

trialPeriod[, Month := as.Date(
  paste(YEARMONTH %/% 100,
        YEARMONTH %% 100,
        "01",
        sep = "-")
)]

ggplot(trialPeriod,
       aes(x = Month,
           y = totSales,
           colour = Store_type,
           group = Store_type)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  labs(title = "Trial vs Control Store Sales",
       x = "Month",
       y = "Total Sales")
       
       
###trial effect (t-test) aur final conclusion
##percantage differance 

trialSales <- measureOverTime[
  STORE_NBR %in% c(trial_store, control_store)
]

trialSales <- dcast(
  trialSales,
  YEARMONTH ~ STORE_NBR,
  value.var = "totSales"
)

names(trialSales) <- c("YEARMONTH", "Trial", "Control")

trialSales[, PercentageDiff := ((Trial - Control) / Control) * 100]

trialSales

##Trial months
trialSales[YEARMONTH >= 201902]

##Simple t-test
t.test(
  trialSales[YEARMONTH < 201902]$PercentageDiff,
  trialSales[YEARMONTH >= 201902]$PercentageDiff
)


library(ggplot2)

ggplot(trialPeriod,
       aes(x = TransactionMonth,
           y = totSales,
           colour = Store_type,
           group = Store_type)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  labs(
    title = "Trial Period Sales Comparison",
    x = "Month",
    y = "Total Sales"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
